name: Texas Wiener Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat. Drain off excess fat.
2. Add the chili powder, cumin, paprika, onions, and oregano to the pan with the cooked beef. Stir until well combined.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Gradually add ketchup, stirring constantly until heated through. Adjust seasoning if needed before serving.
